indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The open space lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it difficult to concentrate.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no desk or table at sitting height to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or seating options are available for comfortable long-term use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting is insufficient for screen work, and there is no task lighting available.

indicators.name: no dedicated low-distraction room layout
indicators.rationale: The open space is not designed for focused solo work, as it is a common area with multiple uses.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space and lack of dedicated work surfaces, ergonomic seating, and task lighting make it challenging to set up a productive workstation. The open layout and absence of a dedicated area for focused work further undermine the suitability for solo computer work.
